base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wily_castle_bosses — a character (boss) from 1987 mega man. Wily Castle bosses composite — Yellow Devil (modular-blob), Copy Robot (mirror-mega-man), CWU-01P (bubble-generator), Wily Machine-1. 891×946 large canvas with multiple-phase attack patterns. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wily Castle bosses composite — Yellow Devil (modular-blob), Copy Robot (mirror-mega-man), CWU-01P (bubble-generator), Wily Machine-1. 891×946 large canvas with multiple-phase attack patterns
